creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to László Károlyi from comment #82)
These numbers does not matter.  On my 16G machine I got the issue in approximately 1 week of uptime.

The port (not the stock vendor driver) has the tunable hw.re.max_rx_mbuf_sz that can be set eg. to 4096 to avoid use of two pages clusters.
